notes: Neo Genesis (neo1, 2000), early WOTC/Neo era. Confirmed across PSA registry article, Flipside Gaming rarity review, and Bulbapedia: 11-card booster = 7 common + 3 uncommon + 1 rare slot. Holo rare inserted in approximately 1 in 3 packs (community/era-average rate; WOTC never officially published exact odds). NO reverse-holo slot — reverse holos began with Legendary Collection, which came AFTER Neo Destiny, so the entire Neo block (Genesis through Destiny) has no reverse-holo filler. NO secret rares in Neo Genesis (Crystal/secret rares are an e-Card-era feature). The single rare slot resolves to non-holo rare ~2/3 of packs (0.6667) or rare-holo ~1/3 (0.3333). Hit bucket = rare-holo. No ETB existed in this era. Booster box = 36 packs; sealed vintage box carries a large collector premium so EV/booster will sit far below box price — expected, rates not inflated to compensate. Confidence=low: applying the era-average 1:3 holo rate without a Neo-Genesis-specific community pull study. Available buckets {rare-holo, rare, uncommon, common} all used; each slot distribution sums to exactly 1.0.
